channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh as Fed chair, ending standoff over Powell probe
item.description: Investigators dropped a probe into Fed Chair Jerome Powell last month.

item.title: Breakdown of $1 billion request for Trump's White House ballroom project
item.description: A detailed look at the $1 billion request for President Trump's White House ballroom project.

item.title: Tax cuts clash with inflation as voters assess Trump's economy ahead of midterms
item.description: Republicans hope voters focus on working-class tax cuts when evaluating the economy and the 2025 law signed by President Donald Trump.

item.title: Maggie Murdaugh's friends aim to preserve her legacy
item.description: CBS News' Nikki Battiste speaks with two of Maggie Murdaugh's longtime friends for "48 Hours."
